description: Verify baseline: ensure the project builds and all existing tests pass before making changes
steps: Run 'go mod download' to fetch all dependencies
Run 'go test ./...' and confirm all tests pass
Run 'golangci-lint run --fix ./...' and confirm zero issues
Run 'CGO_ENABLED=0 go build' and confirm successful build
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with zero failures
findings: Baseline verified on branch migrate-to-yaml-v3 at commit e51c0a9. All 11 test packages pass (8 with no test files skipped). golangci-lint 0 issues. CGO_ENABLED=0 build succeeds. Go 1.25.1 runtime compatible with go 1.24 module directive.
